name: triage filter rejects a docs-only PR (no code changes) regardless of review activity
command: printf '{"number":6,"merged":true,"author_type":"User","docs_only":true,"substantive_comments":4,"reviewer_requested_changes":true,"iterative_pushes":2}\n' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/triage.sh" --pr pr.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decision=reject' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=docs-only' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
